description: Polymarket is a prediction market platform where users trade on event outcomes. Its documentation covers public market data access and authenticated trading through its central limit order book.
summary: polymarket.com exposes documented REST APIs: public market/data endpoints on `gamma-api.polymarket.com` and authenticated CLOB trading endpoints on `clob.polymarket.com`; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI on the polymarket.com domain were found.

surfaces.name: Polymarket public/data and CLOB HTTP APIs
